zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Vawdrey於1598年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓時，他的父親Edward Vawdrey34歲，母親Jane Hyde33歲。他於大約1644年與Anne Markham在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1714年享年116歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Vawdrey于1598年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓时，他的父亲Edward Vawdrey34岁，母亲Jane Hyde33岁。他于大约1644年与Anne Markham在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1714年享年116岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vawdrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Vaudrey
meanings: French, Huguenot: (i) locative name from Vaudrey (Jura). (ii) relationship name possibly in some cases an anglicized spelling of Vaudré(e), from the Germanic personal name Waldrad, composed of waldan ‘ruler’ + rad ‘counsel’.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Vawdrey was born in 1598, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Vawdrey, was 34 and his mother, Jane Hyde, was 33. He married Anne Markham about 1644, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1714, at the age of 116.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Vawdrey est né en 1598, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Vawdrey, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jane Hyde, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Anne Markham environ 1644, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1714, à l’âge de 116 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Vawdrey 1598 in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Vawdrey 34 und seine Mutter Jane Hyde 33. Er hat um 1644 in England, United Kingdom Anne Markham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1714 im Alter von 116 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Vawdrey è nato il nel 1598 nel Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edward Vawdrey, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Jane Hyde, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Anne Markham circa 1644, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1714, all'età di 116 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Vawdreyが1598年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで生まれた時，父Edward Vawdreyは34歳，母Jane Hydeは33歳であった。約1644年にイギリスイギリスでAnne Markhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1714年に116歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Vawdrey(이)가 1598년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Vawdrey(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Hyde(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1644년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Anne Markham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1714년 116세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Vawdrey nasceu em 1598, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Vawdrey, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jane Hyde, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Markham aproximadamente 1644, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1714, com 116 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Vawdrey родился в 1598 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Vawdrey было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Hyde, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Markham около 1644 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1714 г. в возрасте 116 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Vawdrey nació en 1598, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Vawdrey, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jane Hyde, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Anne Markham aproximadamente 1644, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1714, a la edad de 116 años.
